scenario.name: Basic UAS responder
scenario.send:
SIP/2.0 183 Session Progress [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=2 [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length:[len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/SAVP 0 8 101 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000/1 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=acfg:1 t=1 a=1 a=crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:k8FuMlkO/O4uy4OnGiN5VIC3lxcc5MlmjuAcY0a7 UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP
SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] From: [$14] To: [$15] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: 0

UPDATE [$16] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: [$15] To: [$14] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 2 UPDATE Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length:[len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687638 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/SAVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=ptime:20 a=acfg:1 t=1 a=1 a=crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:k8FuMlkO/O4uy4OnGiN5VIC3lxcc5MlmjuAcY0a7 UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP

SIP/2.0 200 OK Via: [$3] From: [$4] To: [$5];tag=2 [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687638 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/SAVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=ptime:20 a=acfg:1 t=1 a=1 a=crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:k8FuMlkO/O4uy4OnGiN5VIC3lxcc5MlmjuAcY0a7 UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP
